action.reasoning: Observation: Beam search lifted exprate to 0.0934 (val peak ~0.106); further training with res=288 gave 0.0892 test. Debug shows strong simple cases (sqrt{48}, 26, 4^2+frac) but errors on derivatives (\mbox instead of d), sub/superscripts, long nums (truncates zeros), q_t mispredicted as q_2. Loss plateaus ~1.05. best.pt likely not optimal due to resume without val reset. Analysis: ResNet50+Bahdanau+LSTM+aspect-pad+aug+beam valid for HMER basics (loss drops, structure learned); root limits=seq len too long at high res (attention dilution), symbol confusion, exposure bias. Workspace files truncated (model.py/generate incomplete, train.py cut at resume), risking errors. With ~9.7min left, ~3-4 epochs feasible. Decision: Fully rewrite non-truncated model.py (complete _greedy_generate, new _beam_search_single with hidden-per-hyp, length-norm alpha=0.6, proper EOS/SOS strip); set target_h=160/w=1024 (seq~160 balanced). Full train.py (resume+initial val to set best_exprate correctly, bs=32, lr=2e-4, clip, CE+LS=0.1, 4 epochs, per-batch+epoch jsonl logs, best on val_exprate). Minor predict/debug updates (consistent params, beam=5). Run train+debug (fits time) then submit_eval on best.pt targeting >0.095 via fixes+better res/convergence.
